positive: A minimalistic, abstract depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. Silhouette style with deep navy blue and midnight purple hues contrasting sharply against vibrant pops of bioluminescent emerald green and warm golden yellow. The scene features stylized, winding tree branches forming intricate, fractal-like patterns, interspersed with glowing orbs representing distant stars and planets. The composition is perfectly symmetrical, centered on a vanishing point, ideal for a circular or square apparel print. Clean lines, strong contrast, geometric simplicity, high-contrast ink look, vector illustration quality, flat color fields, ethereal, dreamy, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, blurry, noise, grain, poorly drawn, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, cluttered, photorealistic, gradient, muted colors
